title: Trif (Human)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Trif_MC99.jpg]] |name=Trif |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=Blonde |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Alliance of Free Planets]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Trif''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] who defected and joined the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]. ==Biography== Trif served both as a staff [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] under [[Fenn Shysa]] and as a soldier during the [[Nagai–Tof War]]. During that conflict, shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he joined a fleet that gathered at the planet [[Godo]], where he, along with fellow pilots [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Fenn Shysa]], [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]], and [[Maggie]], sided with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the standoff between the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance fleet]] and the [[Godoan/Legends|Godoans]]. Later, he was part of a small team sent to infiltrate the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] base on [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] during the [[Battle of Saijo|last battle]] of the war. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 99}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 107|''Star Wars'' (1977) 107]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 107}}
